meaning: n.射击名手,神枪手,<俚>(追求暴利的)奸商
examples: I'd love to be a sharpshooter.
I didn't know your father was a sharpshooter.
Let's not fall victim to the Oklahoma sharpshooter.
Gorugo 13, about the travails of a mercenary sharpshooter, is representative of the trend.
The Spurs signed undaunted sharpshooter Gary Neal to a guaranteed deal after watching him scorch the nets on the UNLV campus.
